title: Quantum Computing Threats
description: Large fault-tolerant quantum computers could weaken Bitcoin's public-key signature assumptions and accelerate proof-of-work search. The threat is distinct from ordinary key guessing and motivates migration planning for quantum-resistant authorization.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Bitcoin keys, signatures, and the security assumptions affected by future cryptanalytic advances.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech: Quantum Computing
resources.notes: Bitcoin-specific analysis of quantum attacks and migration considerations.
